message:
feat(cli): ID resolution in create, epic close safeguard, and command improvements

create:
- Resolve parent and dependency IDs via IdResolver before storing,
  so abbreviated hashes and prefixed IDs are canonicalized at creation
  time rather than stored as-is.
- Switch dry-run and import output from ctx.print to ctx.print_line
  for correct line-oriented display.

close:
- Add epic safeguard: closing an epic with open children now requires
  --force, preventing accidental premature closure. Uses batch
  get_epic_counts() for efficiency.
- Switch unblocked-issue output to ctx.print_line.

epic:
- Replace per-epic N+1 get_dependents_with_metadata() calls with a
  single batch get_epic_counts() query. Remove now-unnecessary
  client-side sort (DB already returns priority-ordered results).

list:
- Remove unused SqliteStorage import and N+1 label pre-fetch from
  apply_client_filters (labels are now filtered server-side).
- Add unit tests for client filter combinations (id+priority+text,
  overdue with deferred exclusion).

dep:
- Optimize render_dep_tree_rich() from O(n^2) child lookup to O(n)
  via pre-computed HashMap of parent_key -> children.
- Switch all plain-mode output to ctx.print_line.

sync (flush):
- Simplify the empty-DB safety guard: use count_issues() instead of
  loading all issues, and remove the stale-DB detection block that
  duplicated preflight logic.

Other:
- IssueCompletionFilter::Any now excludes Tombstone status, and
  Closed no longer matches Tombstone, preventing ghost issues from
  appearing in completion suggestions.
- Add schema command doc warning about API instability.
- Fix priority help text (remove "P0-P4" since raw ints are expected).
- Formatting cleanup in doctor, show, concurrency, and global-flags
  tests (rustfmt line-length compliance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
